parameters.query:
=WITH flavor_match AS (
  SELECT m.id, m.item_name, m.price, m.category,
         (SELECT p.photo_url FROM public.menu_item_photos p
           WHERE p.menu_item_id = m.id AND p.is_visible = TRUE
           ORDER BY p.sort_order LIMIT 1) AS photo_url
  FROM public.menu_items m
  WHERE m.ai_promo = TRUE AND m.dine_in = TRUE
    AND '{{ ($json.query.flavor || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, '').toLowerCase() }}' <> ''
    AND (lower(m.category)  LIKE '%{{ ($json.query.flavor || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, '').toLowerCase() }}%'
      OR lower(m.item_name) LIKE '%{{ ($json.query.flavor || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, '').toLowerCase() }}%')
  ORDER BY random() LIMIT 1
),
any_promo AS (
  SELECT m.id, m.item_name, m.price, m.category,
         (SELECT p.photo_url FROM public.menu_item_photos p
           WHERE p.menu_item_id = m.id AND p.is_visible = TRUE
           ORDER BY p.sort_order LIMIT 1) AS photo_url
  FROM public.menu_items m
  WHERE m.ai_promo = TRUE AND m.dine_in = TRUE
  ORDER BY random() LIMIT 1
)
SELECT * FROM flavor_match
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM any_promo WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM flavor_match)
LIMIT 1;
